PATENT_SEARCH_API_KEY.title: Patent Search API Key
PATENT_SEARCH_API_KEY.description: API key minted from the AI Patent Search Generator Chrome extension's Admin tab. Format: psg_live_... or psg_test_...

PATENT_SEARCH_API_BASE.title: API Base URL (optional)
PATENT_SEARCH_API_BASE.description: Override the API base URL. Default https://us-central1-solicitation-matcher-extension.cloudfunctions.net/ai/v1
